p2p_enrichment.notes: Added 4 new pass_to_pass tests from repo CI/CD: (1) test_repo_typecheck - pnpm check (TypeScript typecheck), (2) test_repo_parser_tests - pnpm vitest run for parser-modern, parser-legacy, compiler-errors, (3) test_repo_lint - pnpm build && pnpm lint (eslint + prettier), (4) test_repo_syntax_check_acorn - acorn syntax validation for modified files. All new p2p tests pass on base commit. Build took ~60s, lint ~10s, typecheck ~5s, parser tests ~2s.

validate.notes: All 4 validation checks passed: Docker build succeeded, NOP test correctly returned reward=0 (6 fail_to_pass tests failed on base commit), Gold test returned reward=1 (all 11 tests passed after solve.sh patch applied), Rubric judge ICR=1.0. The task validates error handling refactoring in Svelte parser - moving error handling from individual parser files (index.js, context.js, script.js, expression.js) into a centralized acorn.js module.
